case_title: BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC VS. JAMES LEACH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEACH, JAMES $5,192.93 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,256.06 INTEREST, $149.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,258.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT LEACH, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE OF DEFT JAMES LEACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC AS TO DEFENDANT LEACH, JAMES

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
